local_results.title: The Observatory
local_results.description: Trendy pick for comfort eats & cocktails. Stylish neighborhood eatery earns buzz for its creative take on American classics & craft cocktails.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Creative and delicious menus, great service, fun and comfortable atmosphere!"

local_results.title: Q Restaurant & Bar
local_results.description: Stylish spot for Pacific Northwest fare. Modern & romantic space featuring imaginative, locally sourced Pacific Northwest cuisine.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The food and drinks were absolutely amazing and the service was stellar!"

local_results.title: Hearth & Vine
local_results.user_review: "The food is delicious and the vibe is elevated, intimate and cozy."

local_results.title: Screen Door Eastside
local_results.description: Southern comfort food with a NW twist. Refined Southern specialties like buttermilk-fried chicken in roomy digs offering weekend brunch.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Outstanding food, super friendly staff, and a very cool, welcoming ambiance."

local_results.title: Lilia Comedor
local_results.description: Upscale restaurant serving creative Pacific Northwest dishes with a Mexican influence.
local_results.user_review: "The food, drink and welcoming environment were beyond fulfilling."

local_results.title: Coquine
local_results.description: Refined New American fare in warm digs. Cozy corner kitchen serving polished, farm-to-table New American dinners & casual cafe fare by day.
local_results.user_review: "Absolutely fantastic, great food, decent service and the setting is fun!"

local_results.title: Siam Umami
local_results.description: Casual, cozy, friendly Thai eatery for familiar dishes like curry and pork belly plus cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "Literally everything from the ambiance to the food and drinks were perfect."

local_results.title: Le Pigeon
local_results.description: Vibrant, cozy French restaurant. Elegant French-inspired fare served with a diverse selection of wines in a lively & intimate room.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "We were blown away by the food, and the service was equally top notch."

local_results.title: Emerald Line
local_results.description: Hip Mediterranean eatery with a terrace. Trendy venture preparing Mediterranean meals & drinks in a colorful building with patio seating.
local_results.user_review: "Quick service, delicious food, laid back neighborhood vibe."

local_results.title: Olympia Provisions
local_results.description: Cured meats & meals in industrial space. Housemade charcuterie & European-style meals provided in an industrial space with a to-go counter.
local_results.user_review: "The food, the drinks, the service, and the atmosphere are all top-notch!"

local_results.title: Canard
local_results.description: Chic global kitchen & cocktail venue. Dishes take their inspiration from all over the world at this stylish venue mixing fresh cocktails.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review:
"Love the drinks, food, vibe, hospitality

Menu is incredible."

local_results.title: Arden Restaurant Portland
local_results.description: Airy wine bar with seasonal plates. Warm, rustic-modern outpost offering seasonal Pacific Northwest cuisine & a sizeable wine menu.
local_results.user_review: "We couldn’t have asked for better food, atmosphere, drinks, and service."

local_results.title: Behind The Museum Cafe
local_results.description: Serene hideaway for tea & Japanese bites. Tranquil, antique-lined space where kimono-clad servers offer coffee, tea & light Japanese nibbles.
local_results.user_review: "Both were delicious and the atmosphere was relaxing."

local_results.title: Higgins
local_results.description: Sophisticated, locally focused NW bistro. Longtime classy spot for local & sustainable NW fare, with a lively bar, many beers & Oregon wines.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Delicious food, great drinks and impeccable atmosphere"

local_results.title: Rachel & Rose
local_results.user_review: "A unique oasis in the midst of the bustle of Burnside."

local_results.title: Otto & Anita's Schnitzelhaus
local_results.description: Mom-&-pop spot for old-style German food. Schnitzel, pickle soup & other old-school German dishes are featured at this family-run hideaway.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Awesome food with unique choices, great beer, and in a quirky location."

local_results.title: Dolly Olive
local_results.description: Southern Italian spot with house-baked breads, fresh pastas, and brunch, plus cocktails and wine.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Delicious cocktails, great food, friendly and attentive service."

local_results.title: Constantinople Restaurant Portland
local_results.user_review: "The food was fantastic, and the service and overall atmosphere was great."

local_results.title: NORMANDIE
local_results.description: Bistro fare & Calvados cocktails. Chic bistro with French fare & full bar featuring a lengthy wine list plus 2 happy hour periods.

local_results.title: Roe
local_results.description: Fine-dining seafood destination. Elevated New American seafood tasting menus are served in elegant, cozy surrounds.
